name: Ring of Maniacal Devices (Greater)
description:
This magic ring seems like simple tarnished brass, but it enhances your curiosity about traps and devices of all kinds.

You can use an Interact action to pull a from the ring. This toolkit appears in your hand and any part of it folds back into the ring if they would leave your possession.

They grant you a +3 item bonus to Thievery checks to and to , and the ring's insights grant you the same bonus to Crafting checks to and snares and traps.

Activate—Fireball Trap 10 minutes (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You create the effects of a ritual containing your choice of either a 7th-rank or 7th-rank . You can have only one trapped rune from a ring of maniacal devices active at a time, even if you have multiple rings, and the rune disappears if you lose your investiture in the ring.
